title: Mashup Intelligence Room
public_claim: Mashup Intelligence Room is a MuranoOS room handoff for audio-source management, phrase-level extraction, compatibility discovery, and studio workflow.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes audio sources through an Audio Resonance Room with a SQLite/LanceDB/DuckDB three-database architecture, Resonance Engine, AI Router Console, Automation Console, ingestion, phrase extraction, compatibility search, version memory, workflow state, and export planning so creative or analytic audio work can be managed as a structured room.
